title: Dual Breaking Animation (Dark Theme)
description: Replaces the normal breaking animation with a dual loading bar (Dark Theme).
body:
# Dual Breaking Animation
**Dual Breaking Animation** replaces the normal breaking animation with a dual loading bar which can be read more easily by players. The resource pack comes in two themes : 'Dark' and 'White'. The Dark Theme has the best visibility as it can be fully seen on dark and bright blocks, while the White Theme has better visibility on bright blocks, but can also be seen on darker blocks. We recommend using the Dark Theme if you are using it for BedWars and SkyWars, but in the end it comes to personal preferences. Choose which one is better for you.

### Find The White Theme
**Unforcenetly modrinth dosn't support both theams in the same project so if you would like to get the white theam go to : [Dual Breaking Animation (White Theme)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dual-breaking-animation-white-theme)**
